title: Text Styling
description: Apply multiple styles to a Text component, including fontSize, fontWeight, and color.
problemStatement:
Make it pretty! Create a `<Text>` element with the following styles: `fontSize: 24`, `fontWeight: 'bold'`, and `color: 'red'`.

**Requirement:** Pass an object directly to the `style` prop.
hints: Styles in React Native are similar to CSS but follow camelCase naming (e.g., `fontSize` instead of `font-size`).
expectedOutput: Large, bold, red text on the screen
